title: Splatter Screen for Frying Pan 33cm – Oil Splash Guard Lid with Handle for Pots & Pans – Kitchen Cooking Cover, Dishwasher Safe, Durable Metal Mesh (33x33 With Handle)
features: KEEP YOUR KITCHEN CLEAN – 33cm splatter screen designed to catch oil splashes and food particles, helping to protect walls, hobs, and counters while frying or sauteing.
PREVENT SPILLS – Frying pan splash guard keeps hot oil safely contained, reducing messy spills and protecting hands.
UNIVERSAL FIT – Compatible with most frying pans, saucepans, and pots up to 33cm wide, making it a versatile kitchen essential.
DURABLE & FOOD SAFE – Made from premium metal mesh with a sturdy frame and heat-resistant handle for long-lasting use.
EASY TO CLEAN & STORE – Dishwasher safe splatter guard for quick clean-up. Slim design with handle allows easy storage in cupboards or hanging hooks.
description: Product Description Will this splatter screen fit all types of frying pans and pots? Yes, the TIJAR 33cm splatter screen is designed to fit most standard frying pans and saucepans up to 33cm wide. It’s a universal splash guard lid that works with different pan types to contain oil splashes and food particles. Is the splatter guard durable and safe for everyday cooking? Absolutely. The TIJAR frying pan splatter guard is made from strong metal mesh with a sturdy frame, ensuring long-lasting use. It’s food-safe, heat-resistant, and reliable for daily cooking tasks such as frying, sauteing, or simmering. Can this splash guard help keep my kitchen cleaner while frying? Yes, this 33cm oil splatter screen is designed to protect your stovetop, counters, and walls by reducing grease splashes. It keeps cooking areas cleaner and minimises the mess from frying foods like meat or vegetables. Is the splatter screen easy to clean after use? The TIJAR splatter screen is dishwasher safe and can also be washed easily with warm soapy water. The fine mesh cleans quickly and doesn’t hold on to grease, making it a convenient kitchen accessory for everyday use. Does the handle make it easy to use and store? Yes, the splatter guard comes with a heat-resistant handle for safe handling during cooking. Its slim design allows for easy storage in kitchen cupboards or by hanging it on hooks, making it practical and space-saving.
